name: Salesforce CRM MCP
description: MCP proxy to Salesforce CRM — manage contacts, accounts, opportunities, and custom objects. Supports SOQL queries, record CRUD, and bulk operations.

name: Stripe Payments MCP
description: MCP proxy to Stripe — create charges, manage subscriptions, issue refunds, and retrieve payment intents. PCI-compliant with tokenized card handling.

name: GitHub Issues MCP
description: MCP proxy to GitHub — create and search issues, manage pull requests, list repositories, and read file contents from repos.

name: Slack Notifications MCP
description: MCP proxy to Slack — send messages to channels, create threads, manage reactions, and list channels. Supports Block Kit formatting.

name: Internal Llama 3 70B
description: Proxied access to a fine-tuned Llama 3 70B model hosted on-premise. Optimized for internal code review, summarization, and document analysis. 8K context window.

name: GPT-4o Enterprise
description: Proxied access to OpenAI GPT-4o with enterprise rate limits, usage tracking, and DLP policies. 128K context window. Cost allocated per application.

name: Customer Data API
description: REST API for customer records — CRUD operations on profiles, addresses, preferences, and consent. Supports pagination, filtering, and GDPR-compliant data export.

name: Inventory Service
description: REST API for product inventory — check stock levels, reserve items, update quantities, and receive low-stock alerts. Supports warehouse-level granularity.

name: Order Events Stream
description: Kafka-based event stream for order lifecycle events — order.created, order.paid, order.shipped, order.delivered, order.cancelled. Avro-encoded with schema registry.
